text:
OTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
11th bhava : 3rd lord in 11th gives travels, writings, publications on one’s efforts and happiness
from brothers & sisters and benefits from them. Acquaints himself with good friends & benefits
from them.
12th bhava : if the 12th lord is afflicted associated with malefic in the natal chart then, when it is
in the paribhraman 12th, it is not good period, giving the native mental torture. If it is strong &
well associated in natal chart, then there will be trouble in travel. The native will create enemity
with neighbors.
4th lord in the twelve bhavas of the paribhraman chart
• If natal 4th lord is strong in paribhraman lagna with good aspects, then there is happiness
from his son. If it is weak with malefic aspects then will give difficulties with bad results.
